features: [Compatible Model]: Exclusively designed shockproof case for iPad A16 11th Generation 11 inch 2025 & for iPad 10th Generation 10.9 inch 2022, Model (A3354 / A3355 / A3356 / A2696 / A2757 / A2777). NOT compatible with iPad Air 11''/Pro 11'' or any other model

[Full-body Shockproof Case with Screen Protector]: This Case for iPad 11th/10th Generation is designed with anti-shock material, with hard PC frame, anti-scratch screen protector and soft TPE skin. All-round protection design to keep your 10th/11th generation from scratches, shocks or drop damages

[Foldable Kickstand]: The A16 11th/10th generation case is equipped with a sturdy built-in stand, which can stably support your tablet in the horizontal direction, allowing you to free your hands and providing you with a more flexible and comfortable viewing/typing angle

[Multifunctional Shoulder Strap]: The shoulder strap for iPad 10th/11th generation case is detachable and adjustable, convenient for both kids and adults to carry case for iPad 10th/11th Gen during hiking, traveling or other outdoor activities. You can use it to hang your tablet anywhere to free your hands for better enjoyment
[Customer Service]: If you encounter any problems during product use or installation, please let us know immediately and we will help you solve the problem within 24 hours

Shockproof Case for iPad A16 11th/10th Generation Merchant video Compatibility: ONLY for iPad A16 11th Generation 11 inch 2025, and for iPad 10th Generation 10.9 inch 2022. Model: A3354 / A3355 / A3356 / A2696 / A2757 / A2777. Full Body Protection Case with Screen Protector 3-in-1 Protective Case Solid PC Front Cover Hard PC Bottom Case with Built-in Kickstand Wraparound Shockproof TPE Skin Built-in Screen Protector The iPad 10th/11th Generation case comes with 2 front covers (with or without plastic screen protector). Just need to install one of them according to your needs. Note: Please remove the blue film on the screen protector before installing the front cover. Built-in Kickstand for your Convenience Previous page Multi-angle Stand for Viewing/Typing/Drawing for Online Learning for Watching Videos for Family Time for Outdoor Activities Easy to hold Next page The sturdy kickstand can stably support your iPad 11th/10th generation in landscape mode, helping free your hands and providing you with a more flexible and comfortable viewing/ typing/ drawing angle. Prevention of Drop Damages Kids-friendly Case for iPad 11th/10th Generation With the solid PC frame, scratch-resistant screen protector and TPU bumper, this iPad 11th/10th generation 11 inch/10.9 inch case can protect your iPad from scratches, shocks and drop damages. Its excellent safety performance prolongs the lifetime of the iPad 11th/10th generation. Removable & Adjustable Shoulder Strap The shoulder strap (total length: 172 cm / 67 inches) is adjustable and detachable, convenient for you to carry iPad 11th 10th generation while working, playing or traveling outdoors without the need of a bag or backpack.
